subcodes.first_line: The Ocean of Divine utterance is, in this hour, manifest with waves of mercy, and the Sun of proof hath risen from the horizon of the Tablet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: دریای بیان الهی در این حین بامواج رحمت ظاهر و آفتاب برهان از افق لوح مشرق
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @the mind's power of discovery
